name: RUM PUNCH
intro: This rum punch screams summer and al fresco eating. It screams barbecue season, and, most of all, it screams strawb season – and when strawb season hits, I’m eating them in abundance.

ingredients.item: 1.5 litres (50 fl oz/6½ cups) pineapple juice

method: Start by making the fresh strawberry syrup. Blend all the ingredients together in a blender, and then strain with a sieve.
Put the mint leaves and lime slices for the punch in a big jug (pitcher). Add the strawberry syrup, rum and pineapple juice. Top up with lots of ice, stir well and serve.
